description: Assets under construction or installation not yet ready for use.Examples: Buildings under construction, Plant and machinery being installed.
Amounts recoverable in future periods due to deductible temporary differences, tax losses or credits carried forward.Examples: Provision for doubtful debts.
Change in deferred tax assets and liabilities recognized in profit or loss for the period.
Amounts payable in future periods due to taxable temporary differences.
Internally generated intangible assets in the development. Examples: Software under development, Internally developed patents.
Non-current receivables in the nature of loans and advances. Examples: Security deposits, loans to related parties.
Consideration received on issue of share warrants pending exercise or conversion.
Application money received for shares not yet allotted.
